allow: PowerShell($phpPath = \(Get-Command php -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; if \(-not $phpPath\) { $candidates = @\("C:\\xampp\\php\\php.exe", "C:\\wamp64\\bin\\php\\php8.2\\php.exe", "C:\\laragon\\bin\\php\\php-8.2\\php.exe", "C:\\Program Files\\PHP\\php.exe"\); foreach \($c in $candidates\) { if \(Test-Path $c\) { $phpPath = $c; break } } }; if \($phpPath\) { Write-Output "PHP: $phpPath" } else { Write-Output "PHP no encontrado en PATH ni en rutas comunes" })
